generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate civil defense spending, our communities are left vulnerable. Local emergency responders report that outdated preparedness plans are putting lives at risk. We can't afford to wait for bureaucrats to act - it's time for grassroots action to ensure our neighborhoods are ready. #CommunityFirst #CivilDefenseNow
